tool_args.label: Winter Trackwork Programs & March Timetable

payload.title: Winter Trackwork Programs & March Timetable
payload.description: Staff summary informing the Long Island Committee of the MTA LIRR's plan to adjust schedules beginning March 23, 2026 through May 17, 2026, supporting winter trackwork programs and March timetable changes.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Stewart Avenue Crossing Renewal, Bethpage

payload.description: Reconstruction of the Stewart Avenue crossing in Bethpage as part of LIRR grade crossing state of good repair program. One of two main tracks between Hicksville and Bethpage out of service for 48 hours on March 7-8 and March 14-15.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Main Line – Crossing Renewal – On the weekends of March 7-8, and March 14-15, one of two main tracks between Hicksville and Bethpage will be taken out of service for a period of 48-hours while the Stewart Avenue crossing in Bethpage is reconstructed

tool_args.label: Oakwood Road Crossing Renewal, Huntington

payload.description: Reconstruction of the Oakwood Road crossing in Huntington. One of two main tracks between Cold Spring Harbor and Huntington out of service for 48 hours on February 28-March 1.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Port Jefferson Branch – Crossing Renewal – On the weekend of February 28-March 1, one of two main tracks between Cold Spring Harbor and Huntington will be taken out of service for a period of 48 hours while the Oakwood Road crossing in Huntington is reconstructed

tool_args.label: Stony Hollow Road Bridge Timber Replacement, Greenlawn

payload.project_name: Stony Hollow Road Bridge Timber Replacement
payload.description: Replacement of track ties (bridge timbers) at Stony Hollow Road Bridge in Greenlawn and other infrastructure state of good repair maintenance. Single main track between Huntington and Port Jefferson out of service for 48 hours on March 21-22.
payload.location: Stony Hollow Road Bridge in Greenlawn

location_normalized.raw_text: Stony Hollow Road Bridge in Greenlawn

evidence_refs.source_quote: Port Jefferson Branch – Bridge Timber Replacement – On the weekend of March 21-22, the single main track between Huntington and Port Jefferson will be taken out of service for a period of 48 hours while track ties (bridge timbers) are replaced at Stony Hollow Road Bridge in Greenlawn

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Ronkonkoma/Greenport bus replacement commences

payload.description: Bus service replaces train service between Ronkonkoma and Greenport, weekday/midday, to support state of good repair track maintenance, cross-tie replacement and grade crossing rehabilitations east of Ronkonkoma.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Note: This work will commence on Monday, March 2 nd

tool_args.label: St. Patrick's Day Parade Extra Train Service

payload.description: MTA LIRR will operate extra train service to support increased ridership for the New York City St. Patrick's Day Parade. Two additional westbound trains from both the Ronkonkoma and Babylon branches.

evidence_refs.source_quote: extra train service to support increased ridership for the New York City St. Patrick's Day Parade, which will take place on Tuesday, March 17th

tool_args.label: 10:20pm Penn Station to Huntington added stop at Floral Park

payload.claim_text: The 10:20pm weekday train from Penn Station to Huntington will make an added stop at Floral Park.
payload.description: Train with additional stop based on customer feedback.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The 10:20pm weekday train from Penn Station to Huntington will make an added stop at Floral Park.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The 6:48pm weekday train from Long Beach to Penn Station will make an added stop at Rosedale.

tool_args.label: Huntington/Port Jefferson Branch midday/weekday schedule adjustment

payload.claim_text: Huntington/Port Jefferson Branch – Schedules will be adjusted during the midday/weekday period as track surfacing is performed to maintain our infrastructure in a state of good repair and provide customers with a smoother, more comfortable ride. Service at Westbury will be reduced to hourly in both directions.
payload.description: Service adjustment to support track surfacing on Huntington/Port Jefferson Branch.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Huntington/Port Jefferson Branch – Schedules will be adjusted during the midday/weekday period as track surfacing is performed

tool_args.label: Ronkonkoma/Greenport bus replacement for track maintenance

payload.claim_text: Ronkonkoma/Greenport Branch – Bus service will replace train service between Ronkonkoma and Greenport, weekday/midday, to support state of good repair track maintenance, cross-tie replacement and grade crossing rehabilitations east of Ronkonkoma.
payload.description: Bus replacement for track maintenance between Ronkonkoma and Greenport.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus service will replace train service between Ronkonkoma and Greenport, weekday/midday

tool_args.label: Two additional westbound trains for St. Patrick's Day Parade

payload.claim_text: On Tuesday, March 17th, the Long Island Rail Road will operate two additional westbound trains from both the Ronkonkoma and Babylon branches for customers traveling to New York City for the St. Patrick's Day parade.
payload.description: Extra train service for St. Patrick's Day Parade.

evidence_refs.source_quote: two additional westbound trains from both the Ronkonkoma and Babylon branches
